title: Opus Lunatic
description: a modern deranged modpack that includes the most unhinged mod combination imaginable, and yet, you cant escape greg
body:
**Satisfy your needs for Gregtech and magic in a single modpack!**

Opus Lunatic is made a singular creature with the help of a couple gregtech fans, with the goal to create a modpack that can satisfy both the need to Greg all around, but also magic and bullets. It's a rather simple modpack for now, quests will be added soon-ish :D

the modpack centers around gregtech but also adds some more technology mods that fit the bill

the modpack also includes a vast variety of mods that incentivises exploration and doing silly stuff

and for the magic and bullets? Let's just say its a good mix of both...
